denominator_used: N = 48 tumor samples with both GSE207207 methylation data and GSE207400 RNA-seq data (intersection of beta matrix columns and expression matrix columns)
assumptions_made: GAB1 promoter defined as CpGs whose UCSC_RefGene_Group for GAB1 is one of {TSS200, TSS1500, 5UTR/5URT, 1stExon} (5URT is a typo in the manifest, treated as 5UTR); per-sample promoter methylation computed as the arithmetic mean of all matching probe beta values (10 CpGs); gene expression from GSE207400_Matrix (log-normalized values, directly); sample matching by direct equality of sample identifiers since both the beta matrix columns and expression matrix columns use Tumor_ID-style labels (M* / NF* / cNF*), confirmed against MOESM4 Tumor_ID; two-sided Pearson via scipy.stats.pearsonr
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
  - GPL21145 manifest: 868,565 CpGs (skiprows=7)
  - GSE207207 beta matrix: 108 samples (methylation)
  - GSE207400 expression matrix: 48 samples, GAB1 present
  - MOESM4 clinical: 108 rows used to validate Tumor_ID mapping

B. COHORT
  - Identify GAB1 promoter CpGs -> 10 probes
    (cg22650648, cg07701375, cg16286971, cg05625033, cg14953026, cg01601573, cg12989463, cg14007458, cg19497734, cg09607485)
  - Intersection of expression samples (48, all Tumor_IDs) with methylation samples (108) = 48 samples

C. VARIABLE CODING
  - Methylation: mean of 10 GAB1 promoter CpG beta values per sample
  - Expression: GAB1 row from log-normalized RNA-seq matrix

D. COMPUTATION
  - scipy.stats.pearsonr(mean_promoter_beta, GAB1_logCPM)

E. RESULT
  - Pearson r = -0.5618
  - p-value = 3.261e-05
  - N = 48

F. CAVEATS
  - Expression matrix columns match Tumor_ID exactly (verified against MOESM4)
  - 'RNA label' column in MOESM4 is the raw GEO label; the distributed matrix has already been relabeled to Tumor_ID format
  - 5URT in the EPIC manifest is treated as 5UTR (typo)
  - Mean beta across 10 promoter CpGs; no NaN values present in the GAB1 CpG rows
